headline: This Tech ETF Is Quietly Outperforming QQQ in 2026 -- Is There Still Time to Buy?
summary: Shareholders of the Invesco QQQ ETF (QQQ) aren't getting the tech exposure they think they are. This pure-play ETF is better.

headline: Unlocking Q2 Potential of PepsiCo (PEP): Exploring Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics

headline: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
